title: selaginella ramosissima
intro: Selaginella ramosissima, also known as Ramosissima Spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss, a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella ramosissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. Selaginella ramosissima can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a herbal remedy, which is also sometimes dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
